papers_mined.title: Bedouin House of Hair Wadi Rum Nomads
papers_mined.note: Bayt al-sha'r = goat-hair black tent; coarse weave loose in dry desert allowing convection (slack); fibers swell on rain closing pores (tension); adaptive permeability.

papers_mined.note: Tension held by wooden poles (acacia/date/apricot); central hammar roof beam; tens of straps + poles support canvas; tension/slack actively adjusted.

papers_mined.title: Rigging Traditional Bedouin Tent Abu Dhabi Desert
papers_mined.note: Rigging process — pole-rope-canvas tension calibrated for desert wind; slack adjusted at each pitch.
